category_sources: Official gputils homepage at https://gputils.sourceforge.io/ describes tools for Microchip PIC microcontrollers including gpasm, gplink, and gplib.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is gputils / GNU PIC Utilities: https://gputils.sourceforge.io/.
docs_sources: Official gputils homepage links the SourceForge wiki for in-depth documentation.
Official gputils homepage links the User Manual PDF for tool documentation.
repo_sources: Official gputils homepage lists SVN checkout URLs and links to the SourceForge SVN tree.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official gputils homepage says it includes gpasm, gplink, and gplib for Microchip PIC microcontrollers.
source_facts.executables lists gpasm, gplink, gplib, and related utilities.
